narrative:
Hillsboro Ne (precinct in Highland County) has 842 registered voters, with 53.4% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 36.2% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 10.3%, a pronounced Republican lean of 25.9 percentage points.
